analyze:
Summarize purpose, structure, dependencies of this code package in 100 words max. Use file metadata (paths, line/char counts, imports). Avoid repetition:

##CODE##

Return concise text.
assess:
Evaluate complexity, bugs, clarity of this code package in 100 words max using file metadata (paths, line/char counts, imports). List 3-5 unique improvements. No repetition:

##CODE##

Return: Assessment:
<assessment>
Suggestions:
- <suggestion1>
- <suggestion2>
- ...
sanitize:
Extract Suggestions from this assessment, preserving scores if present:

Assessment Output:
##ASSESSMENT##

Code Summary:
##CODE##

Return:
Suggestions:
##SUGGESTIONS##
Code:
<code>
propose:
Optimize this code based on these suggestions. Preserve exact functionality, imports, names, signatures. Return only a Python dict with full file paths as keys and optimized code as values, e.g., {'/path/to/file.py': 'code'}. No explanations, markdown, or extra text:

Suggestions:
##SUGGESTIONS##

Original Code:
##CODE##
